# Findings — 2026-04-05 — FinaLily Study App

## Reconnaissance (auto-generated by /sk:setup-claude)
- Architecture: Monolith (single Next.js app)
- Entry points: `src/app/layout.tsx`, `src/middleware.ts`
- Key directories:
  - `src/app/(app)/` — authenticated routes (decks, settings, onboarding, study)
  - `src/app/api/` — API routes (generate/topic, generate/pdf, generate/regenerate, decks/[id]/draft-cards)
  - `src/app/auth/` — auth callback routes
  - `src/app/share/` — public share pages
  - `src/actions/` — server actions (cards, decks, profile, share, study)
  - `src/components/` — UI (cards, nav, ui/shadcn)
  - `src/lib/` — prisma client, supabase client (SSR), SM-2 algorithm, openrouter, utils
  - `prisma/` — schema with 8 models (User, Deck, Card, SourceDocument, StudySession, SessionAnswer, ReviewSchedule, ShareArtifact)
  - `supabase/` — local dev config
- Data flow: Supabase Auth → middleware → server actions/API routes → Prisma → PostgreSQL
- AI flow: User input → API route → OpenRouter (OpenAI SDK) → card generation → Prisma persistence

## Repo / Stack Notes
- Framework: Next.js 16.2.2 (App Router) with React 19
- Database: PostgreSQL via Prisma 7 with Supabase (adapter-pg)
- Auth: Supabase SSR (@supabase/ssr)
- AI: OpenAI SDK via OpenRouter for flashcard generation (topic-based + PDF-based)
- UI: Tailwind CSS 4 + shadcn/ui + class-variance-authority + Lucide icons
- PWA: Serwist for service worker / offline support
- Study algorithm: SM-2 spaced repetition (custom implementation in `src/lib/sm2.ts`)
- Card types: FLASHCARD, MCQ, IDENTIFICATION, TRUE_FALSE, CLOZE
- Study modes: LEARN, QUIZ, TEST
- Sharing: via code/link with import count tracking

## Decisions
| Decision | Rationale |
|----------|-----------|
| Prisma over Drizzle | Already established in project, 8 models defined |
| Supabase for auth + hosting | SSR integration, managed PostgreSQL |
| OpenRouter via OpenAI SDK | Flexible model routing for AI generation |

## Resources
- Prisma schema: `prisma/schema.prisma`
- Next.js 16 docs: `node_modules/next/dist/docs/` (per AGENTS.md)
- SM-2 algorithm: `src/lib/sm2.ts`
